Trading, decentralized

dYdX is the leading DeFi protocol developer for advanced trading. Trade 125 cryptocurrencies with low fees, deep liquidity, and up to 20× buying power.

dYdX does not operate, run or deploy any infrastructure on dYdX Chain. Learn more →

Trading, the way it should be

The best of DeFi meets a professional trading experience

Self custody
You, and only you, keep custody of your funds while trading
Many markets
Trade top pairs with deep liquidity. New pairs listed frequently.
Rewards
Instantly earn $DYDX after each trade
Fast onboarding
Log in with your existing crypto wallet and start trading in minutes
Governance
You, the trader, control the future of dYdX Chain
Low fees
Trade in size with an attractive fee structure
Features

A whole new exchange under the hood.

Mobile friendly

A responsive web interface, and native applications designed from the ground up

Fully decentralized

A native chain and governance protocol for dYdX
Curious to explore? View block explorer

Help Center

Learn about trading on dYdX from the help center

Self custody

Your funds are yours. Trade with no risk of bank runs.

Simple onboarding

Get started with dYdX Chain in seconds, with your existing crypto wallet. You can use various frontends to access dYdX

Advanced order types

Trade like a pro with advanced order types, including price triggers.

Earn trading rewards

Earn rewards in $DYDX, as you trade. With $DYDX you can contribute to the governance and future of the protocol. All rewards are made available by the dYdX Foundation. dYdX Trading Inc. is not affiliated with the aforementioned rewards program.

Fully open source

Build on top of the dYdX protocol. Get started by reading documentation, or view the code on Github
Documentation → Terms →
Join the team

We are a vision-led team with a long-term mission.

Mission

Our mission is to democratize access to financial opportunity
